buckets.description: Farmer-market, proximity network, public node, and locality-aware service prompts.
Household, family, journaling, groceries, recipes, and domestic organization prompts.
Workflows, business operations, booking, inventory, and internal-tool prompts.
Messaging, social, publishing, streaming, email, audio, and subscriber prompts.
Tutoring, drills, quizzes, study aids, biographies, guides, and reference prompts.
Creative production, design, art, animation, layout, and presentation prompts.
Technical utilities, automation helpers, file/system tools, and developer aids.
Cataloging, personal archives, libraries, records, and collection-management prompts.
Finance, health, fitness, nutrition, and decision/planning prompts.
Games, trivia, hobby play, and entertainment-oriented prompts.
Legacy HyperCard, HC, and Mac repo prompts that remain useful but span many mixed subtypes.
Modern prompts that do not fit the more specific topical buckets above.
